arts.ttl: 'We spoke' - Former Liverpool boss snubbed Manchester United twice after David Moyes sacking
arts.sum: Jurgen Klopp built a formidable reputation at Liverpool, but he could have been in the home dugout at Old Trafford rather than the away one if he had followed his head

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Man Utd clash under threat as urgent safety meeting held over severe snow
arts.sum: Snow has battered Merseyside overnight, as well as the main travel routes towards Liverpool from Manchester, causing Liverpool City Council to consider whether the game should be called off

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Man Utd postponement latest LIVE as severe snow forces emergency meeting
arts.sum: Liverpool are due to take on Manchester United in the Premier League on Sunday afternoon, but severe snow has hit Merseyside overnight causing the match to be placed under threat

arts.ttl: Man Utd predicted to hit new low as Liverpool clash spells trouble for Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Table-topping Liverpool welcome crisis-ridden Manchester United to Anfield on Sunday, with a massive 23 points and 13 places separating the two Premier League giants

arts.ttl: 'I hate going back to Liverpool after leaving and joining Man Utd – it makes me feel sick'
arts.sum: Michael Owen kicked off his footballing career with Liverpool but also represented their fierce rivals in Manchester United in his later days – and he admits returning to Anfield makes him nauseous

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim reacts to 'strange' chant and makes vow to Manchester United supporters ahead of Liverpool clash
arts.sum: The Red Devils have lost five of their last six Premier League games

arts.ttl: I feel sorry for Ruben Amorim - Liverpool trip is going to be a painful afternoon for Man United
arts.sum: The pundits have had their say and Chris Sutton is predicting a difficult afternoon for Ruben Amorim

arts.ttl: Sunday's Transfer Talk Update: Trevoh Chalobah, Alfie Gilchrist, Darwin Nunez
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.

arts.ttl: Liverpool’s enormous final contract offer to Alexander-Arnold to fight Real Madrid interest
arts.sum: Why Real Madrid’s offer remains more attractive for Alexander-Arnold The significant difference is that if Alexander-Arnold accepts Real Madrid’s offer, it would include a signing bonus directly for him, tipping the scales in favor of the Spanish club.

arts.ttl: How to watch Liverpool vs Manchester United: TV channel and live stream for Premier League today
arts.sum: Arne Slot’s side looking to inflict more misery on Ruben Amorim
